name: Net Portfolio Value After Advisory Fee
short_description: Calculates the net portfolio value after an annual advisory fee is deducted from the initial portfolio value.

inputs.name: fee_rate
inputs.description: Annual advisory fee rate as a decimal

name: One-Year Ending Value After Fee
short_description: Calculates the portfolio's ending value after one year, considering a gross return and an advisory fee.

name: Equity Trade for Rebalancing a Two-Asset Portfolio
short_description: Calculates the necessary equity buy or sell amount to rebalance a two-asset (equities/bonds) portfolio to a target equity percentage, given current asset values.

inputs.name: equities_val
inputs.description: Current market value of equities in the portfolio

inputs.name: bonds_val
inputs.description: Current market value of bonds in the portfolio

inputs.name: target_equity_pct
inputs.description: Target percentage allocation for equities (as a decimal, e.g., 0.6 for 60%)

name: Projected Value with Monthly Contributions (Net of Fees)
short_description: Calculates the future value of a series of monthly contributions, compounded monthly, and then deducts an advisory fee to determine the net projected portfolio value.

inputs.name: f
inputs.description: Annual advisory fee rate (as a decimal)

name: Tax Savings from Tax-Loss Harvesting
short_description: Calculates the tax savings realized by selling an investment at a loss and using that loss to offset ordinary income at the investor's marginal tax rate.

inputs.name: shares
inputs.description: Number of shares of the ETF.

inputs.name: cost_basis
inputs.description: Original purchase price per share of the ETF.

inputs.name: current_price
inputs.description: Current market price per share of the ETF.

inputs.name: marginal_rate
inputs.description: Investor's marginal income tax rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.22 for 22%).
